stance: Diplomatic and strategic thinker always seeking peaceful resolutions.
vita: Born on the neutral planet of Elyria, I was raised amid diverse cultures. As an Aereth child, my parents taught me to respect all life forms. This shaped my diplomacy skills as a Galaxy Negotiator for multiple galactic factions, advocating peaceful coexistence and prosperous trade routes.
portrait_prompt: An elegant Etherian with luminescent skin reflecting the starlight of their home planet's twin sunsets. Their attire is a blend of traditional Aereth patterns and sleek, adaptive armor suited for interstellar travel.
